description: BlueSuite is business management software for home service companies, covering jobs, scheduling, quotes, invoices, payments, CRM, and a client portal. It also offers a ChatGPT app and third-party integrations such as Zapier.
summary: BlueSuite exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://my.bluesuite.app/api/mcp`; its public docs also describe a BlueSuite-issued API key used for the Zapier integration, but no separate public REST/GraphQL API or CLI docs were found.
